prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电子信息、临床医学等热门专业持续高热；本省2026年物理类考生约11.4万人，较2025年11.7万人略有下降，竞争略缓和；武汉大学位于湖北，非本省高校，无显著地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（约8.1%）、学校声誉偏负面可能抑制报考热度，在2025年基准2641名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约2870名，区间2543–3197名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 1798 → 1077 → 2099 → 2080 → 2641, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1564 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2641; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 41 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40, an increase of about 8.1% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 9th in the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th in 2025-2026, with a stable and slightly improving ranking; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (64 negative events out of 99), mainly involving campus safety, teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc.; the 2025 cycle evaluation is clearly negative (all 12 events are negative); Douyin popularity ranks 19th overall (high heat), but negative public opinion may suppress application enthusiasm; 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Geophysics A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Biology A, Chinese Language and Literature A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly sought after; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 114,000, a slight decrease from 117,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Wuhan University is located in Hubei, not a provincial university, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 8.1%), and the somewhat negative school reputation that may suppress application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 2641, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2870, with a range of 2543–3197.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2543-3197, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2543), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Hongyi College and Computer Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 3197), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 9th in the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th in 2025-2026, with a stable upward trend; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is relatively negative (64 negative out of 99 events), mainly involving campus safety, teacher ethics, etc.; Douyin popularity ranks 19th overall (high heat), but negative public opinion may suppress application enthusiasm; Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., with outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 plan (about 23.1%), and the negative school reputation, the reduction effect (intensified competition → ranking moves forward) and negative reputation (cooling applications → ranking moves backward) are in opposite directions, with the reduction effect dominating; the predicted minimum ranking is about 237th, with a range of 187–287.
